description: RA/OA synovial scRNA-seq + CyTOF + bulk + flow (51 samples)
MASC expanded effector CD4+ T-cell subset in RA; bulk RNA-seq of sorted CD4 (blood+synovium)
pooled scRNA-seq of T cells from human synovial tissue (RA/OA; 5 samples)
deep synovial single-cell atlas (>314k cells, 79 donors, CTAP subtypes)
role_in_future_validation: depth (large atlas) but no matched RA-vs-OA control comparator
caveat: deep but no within-study OA/healthy control comparator
